DocumentationSubject.Summary: `meta-tabular` creates sanctioned MetaTabular workspaces for modeling tabular analytics artifacts.
Required. Directory where the empty MetaTabular workspace will be created.
Create modeled objects on an Analysis Services tabular instance.
MetaTabular workspace to deploy. Defaults to the current directory.
Optional target database name. Defaults to the modeled database name.
Drop an existing target database before create/deploy.
Deploy metadata only and skip full processing.
Promote a processed tabular database through backup and restore.
Required. Source Analysis Services server containing the processed database.
Required. Target database name to restore.
Required. Backup file path accessible to the Analysis Services service accounts.
Drop an existing target database before restore.
Drop a tabular database from an Analysis Services tabular instance.
Optional. Workspace path. Default: current working directory.
Optional. Workspace path. Default: current working directory.
Optional. Workspace path. Default: current working directory.
